about.title: About
about.description1: Archi Curation is a curator-driven archive of architecture, mapping buildings, architects, and cities into an interconnected web of spatial knowledge.
about.description2: The project aims to present architecture not as isolated objects but as a network of relationships — between designers and their works, between buildings and their cities, between historical movements and contemporary practice.
about.description3: Each entry is carefully selected and contextualized, offering a perspective that goes beyond conventional architectural databases.
about.quote: Architecture is the learned game, correct and magnificent, of forms assembled in the light.
